turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi alan , how is alan ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hi , good to see the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good to see alan as well . is alan ready to get started ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes alan is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , alan is a 61-year-old male , here with complaints of shortness of breath . so alan , what's going on ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so over the weekend , uh , alan took a very long bike ride , about three hours or so and alan got back , alan was very light headed , alan was short of breath and the shortness of breath really surprised alan because alan pretty much bike ride every morning and the long bike ride was never an issue before so alan is a little concerned about the shortness of breath .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and has alan had any other symptoms ? has alan had any fever-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: n-

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . chest pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , but alan felt very light headed and , uh , alan- the shortness of breath was hard for alan to catch alan's breath afterwards , so maybe alan did have a little chest pain but , uh , the chest pain , the chest pain eventually went away after about an hour .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , um , and is anyone else sick in alan's , in alan's family ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and any cough ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , alan had a little bit of a cough with alan's first cold in the last year and a half , but the cough went away after about a week or so .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . um , and any other symptoms ? the doctor know alan went through the review of symptoms-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . with the nurse but any nausea or vomiting or abdominal pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: n- no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . well , the doctor know that the doctor has treated alan for migraines in the past . how is alan doing with the migraines ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the migraines have been under control . alan has , uh , taken medication , alan has , uh , avoided bright lights and the migraine control is so far so good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and the doctor think the doctor had alan on imitrex for the migraines . has alan-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , alan is still taking imitrex .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . and then alan's reflux , how is alan doing with alan's reflux ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alan is managing alan's reflux as well .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay and everything's working out well with the protonix ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and then the doctor know alan had the cataract surgery about three months ago , is alan's vision okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the cataract surgery was about four and a half months ago and alan's vision has been actually great ever since the cataract surgery .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . all right , well , the doctor is gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam . the doctor wan na see alan's vital signs first .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , show the doctor the vital signs . okay , so looking here , everything looks quite good . alan's oxygenation is perfect , which is wonderful . let the doctor just take a listen . deep breath . another one . good . so , on alan's physical exam , alan's neck is nice and supple . the doctor do n't appreciate any jugular venous distension . alan's heart is in a regular rhythm , the doctor do n't hear any murmur . alan's lungs do have a slight wheeze , expiratory wheeze , bilaterally . the doctor can hear the slight wheeze every time alan breathe and the doctor see trace lower extremity edema in alan's lower extremities . so what does all that mean ? you know , alan , uh , the doctor 'm not quite sure yet but the doctor 're gon na review some of alan's results . hey dragon , show the doctor the chest x-ray . so looking here , the chest x-ray is a very normal chest x-ray . um , the doctor do n't see any pulmonary edema , there's no pneumonia , so the doctor is viewing alan's chest x-ray as , the chest x-ray is a norm- the chest x-ray is normal .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , let's look at alan's pulmonary function test . hey dragon , show the doctor alan's , the pfts . and looking here again , the pulmonary function tests look quite good , the doctor 'm , the doctor 'm quite encouraged by the pulmonary function tests . the pulmonary function tests are , the pulmonary function tests are normal pulmonary function tests . hey dragon , show the doctor the labs . and all of alan's labs here look quite good here as well so , the doctor- the doctor- the doctor 'm very pleased . so , right now the doctor's impression of alan is that alan may have had an asthma exacerbation from exercising and with the allergies , so at this point in time the doctor 'd like to go ahead and prescribe alan some albuterol inhaler .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: two puffs every four hours as needed for wheezing or for shortness of breath . and , the doctor 'd like to go ahead and order a pulmonary referral for alan , okay . does alan have any questions about the pulmonary referral ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no questions , thanks .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , order a pulmonary referral . hey dragon , order albuterol inhaler , two puffs every four hours , as needed for shortness of breath . and then the doctor think from alan's reflux standpoint , everything seems stable and alan's migraines , the doctor think that the doctor should just continue on with the imitrex , as needed . does continuing on with the imitrex sound good to alan ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: continuing on with the imitrex sounds fine .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor wan na see alan in a couple weeks and if alan have the shortness of breath again , the doctor want alan to call the doctor right away , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the doctor got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . good to see alan .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: same here .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , finalize the note .
